description: Functional tags describe a core capability or tension — not an item type, not a use case. Each tag is abstract enough that it could manifest as a weapon, a tool, a ritual object, a social object, a survival item, or a trade good depending on guild identity, twist, and context. The tag says what the item can do or what pressure it puts on the fiction. The guild says what it looks like. The twist says what is complicated about it.
design_principle: Every tag should pass the three-item test: can it plausibly produce a weapon, a tool, AND a ritual object? If a tag can only produce one type of item it is too specific. Specificity lives in the guild and the twist, not in the tag. No tag appears more than once in a single merchant layout.

functional_tags.tag: amplifies force or impact applied through it
functional_tags.note: weapon upgrade, a lever, a ritual amplifier, a percussion instrument that carries further, a press that seals wounds

functional_tags.tag: absorbs and stores energy from an outside source, releasing it later
functional_tags.note: a capacitor stone, a bow that draws power from tension, a ritual vessel charged by moonlight, a trap that stores kinetic force

functional_tags.tag: redirects force or momentum rather than stopping it
functional_tags.note: a deflecting shield, a ritual that turns a curse back, a rope system that changes a load's direction, a social tool that turns aggression into compliance

functional_tags.tag: generates persistent heat or cold in a controlled radius
functional_tags.note: a warming stone, a preservation vessel, a weapon that burns, a ritual tool that chills fever, a way to survive extreme environments

functional_tags.tag: produces or sustains light with properties beyond ordinary fire
functional_tags.note: a light source that reveals hidden things, one that only illuminates for the holder, one that cannot be extinguished by wind or water, one used in rituals of truth

functional_tags.tag: disrupts or interferes with coherent thought, attention, or concentration
functional_tags.note: a combat disorienter, a negotiation tool, a ritual that breaks focus from a harmful obsession, a sound or smell that scatters animals

functional_tags.tag: accelerates or enhances a natural process already underway
functional_tags.note: speeds healing, fermentation, growth, rot, fire spreading, a ritual already in progress, the drying of a wound, the setting of a bone

functional_tags.tag: slows or suspends a natural process
functional_tags.note: preserves food, slows bleeding, holds a ritual effect in stasis, delays the spread of poison, keeps a fire from consuming its fuel

functional_tags.tag: converts one form of effort or input into a different form of output
functional_tags.note: turns breath into sound at distance, turns blood into fire, turns physical motion into a signal, converts heat into motion, turns pain into focus

functional_tags.tag: vents or safely discharges an accumulated pressure before it becomes dangerous
functional_tags.note: releases built-up ritual charge, lets a bound spirit settle, discharges tension in a negotiation, relieves a cursed object's buildup, bleeds a wound before it poisons

functional_tags.tag: produces a controlled vibration, resonance, or oscillation with a secondary effect
functional_tags.note: shakes a structure loose, calms a beast, cracks stone along a grain, matches a tuned bone's frequency, disrupts a concentrating mage

functional_tags.tag: concentrates a diffuse ambient effect into a single small point
functional_tags.note: focuses warmth into one spot, gathers ambient magic into a charge, collects scent onto a trail, draws a crowd's attention toward one speaker

functional_tags.tag: reflects or echoes an incoming effect back toward its origin
functional_tags.note: a shield that returns a blow, a ritual counter that feeds a curse back, a sound mirror, a trap that turns force on the one who set it off

functional_tags.tag: primes or readies an effect without triggering it — holds it for a condition
functional_tags.note: a pre-loaded ritual waiting for a trigger, a trap built but not sprung, a curse written but not sealed, a blow held until the moment is right

functional_tags.tag: maintains a steady output without attention, tending, or resupply
functional_tags.note: a lamp that does not need tending, a warming stone that does not cool, a ward that does not weaken, a spring that does not empty

functional_tags.tag: delivers a sudden concentrated harmful effect beyond the object's ordinary capacity
functional_tags.note: a blow that exceeds the weapon's usual reach, a ritual effect that injures at one specific moment, a revelation that destroys trust in one sentence

functional_tags.tag: reveals what is present but not visible to ordinary perception
functional_tags.note: finds hidden objects, reads magical residue, locates living things through walls, sees emotional states as color, detects structural weakness in materials

functional_tags.tag: extends the reach of one or more senses beyond their natural range
functional_tags.note: hears across distance, sees in darkness, smells a trail hours old, feels vibrations through stone, tastes poison in food before swallowing

functional_tags.tag: reads the history or previous use of an object or location
functional_tags.note: knows who last held something, what was said in a room, whether blood was spilled here, what a tool was used for, the age of a wound or mark

functional_tags.tag: detects the presence or direction of something specific at a distance
functional_tags.note: a compass for water, a tool that points toward a person, a ritual that locates a type of creature, a device that finds structural weakness

functional_tags.tag: reads whether something is genuine or has been altered, forged, or misrepresented
functional_tags.note: detects lies, forgeries, substituted goods, false identity, broken oaths, tampered food, counterfeit currency

functional_tags.tag: perceives the emotional or intentional state of a nearby creature
functional_tags.note: reads fear, desire, deception, grief, aggression — useful in negotiation, taming animals, reading a crowd, identifying the dangerous person in a room

functional_tags.tag: anticipates an immediate threat before it becomes visible or audible
functional_tags.note: warns of ambush, structural collapse, an incoming storm, a creature about to strike, a lie about to be told

functional_tags.tag: reads patterns in the environment to predict near-future conditions
functional_tags.note: weather reading, animal behavior interpretation, route danger assessment, ritual outcome likelihood, crowd behavior projection

functional_tags.tag: distinguishes one specific target or quality from many similar ones
functional_tags.note: identifies the poisoned cup among ten, finds one person in a crowd by a specific trait, tells one tribe's kill-mark from another's, separates a genuine relic from copies

functional_tags.tag: perceives the internal structure or composition of something without opening it
functional_tags.note: reads an egg's contents, assesses an animal's organs, finds the break in a sealed vessel, reads a wound's depth without cutting, traces veins in stone

functional_tags.tag: notices change or disturbance against a stable baseline
functional_tags.note: a threshold that registers who crossed it, a ward that knows if a word has been said, a knot that tells you someone has untied it, a stone that marks disturbed earth

functional_tags.tag: reveals connections or relationships between otherwise separate things
functional_tags.note: marks who a child belongs to, draws a line between a thief and what they took, shows which of two wounded people caused the other's wound, connects an object to its maker

functional_tags.tag: assesses the true nature, quality, or value of something
functional_tags.note: identifies genuine goods, reads a creature's actual strength, assesses a wound's severity, determines the real worth of an object in trade

functional_tags.tag: reveals what a target is hiding from themselves as much as from others
functional_tags.note: names an unspoken fear, exposes a buried grief, surfaces a self-deception, shows a healer the cause they kept missing, makes a person see their own blind spot

functional_tags.tag: filters or clarifies a noisy or overloaded perceptual input
functional_tags.note: separates one voice from many in a market, picks one scent through smoke, finds the real tremor in ambient shaking, clears fog from vision for a moment

functional_tags.tag: recalls or replays a previously perceived moment for later review
functional_tags.note: a bone that plays back the last thing it heard, a crystal that holds a face, a ritual that recreates a scene, an ash that traces a vanished speaker's words

functional_tags.tag: records or stores an experience, event, or piece of information for later retrieval
functional_tags.note: a memory vessel, a contract witness, a stone that holds a voice, a mark that replays what happened, an object that carries a route description

functional_tags.tag: transfers knowledge or skill from one source to a recipient
functional_tags.note: teaches a language, passes on a ritual procedure, carries a craftsperson's technique, transfers an animal's instincts, shares a dying person's final knowledge

functional_tags.tag: accesses knowledge or memory that does not belong to the bearer
functional_tags.note: reads another person's memory, communes with a dead ancestor, extracts a location from an object, learns what a creature knows, reads the land's accumulated experience

functional_tags.tag: allows comprehension of an unfamiliar communication system
functional_tags.note: decodes a language, reads animal signals, interprets ritual markings, understands a foreign contract, translates environmental signs

functional_tags.tag: provides guidance about a specific decision or path forward
functional_tags.note: divination, omen reading, route advice from a spirit, a tool that indicates the better of two options, a ritual that narrows uncertainty

functional_tags.tag: selectively removes, obscures, or suppresses a specific memory or piece of knowledge
functional_tags.note: makes a witness forget a face, erases a password from a mind, blurs a route from someone's recollection, takes the sting out of a grief, suppresses a trained reflex

functional_tags.tag: preserves a memory or testimony against decay, manipulation, or forgetting
functional_tags.note: holds a dying statement intact, locks a witnessed moment so it cannot be rewritten, preserves a ritual procedure exactly as performed, keeps an oath-record incorruptible

functional_tags.tag: certifies or witnesses an event such that it cannot later be denied
functional_tags.note: a witness stone for an oath, a mark that confirms a payment happened, a seal that only forms if the thing was true when said, a record that survives both parties

functional_tags.tag: indicates who is owed what by whom, or what obligation remains outstanding
functional_tags.note: makes a loan visible to both parties, marks a favor unreturned, tracks a bloodprice unpaid, a token that represents an obligation until it is discharged

functional_tags.tag: preserves a procedure or technique so it can be re-performed correctly
functional_tags.note: a knotted cord that teaches a ritual, a carved sequence that reproduces a weave pattern, a scent series that guides a compounding, a marked bone that carries a lost technique

functional_tags.tag: binds a piece of knowledge to a specific person so only they can retrieve it
functional_tags.note: a memory vessel that opens only for a chosen heir, a contract readable only by the named party, a ritual script legible only to an initiate, a route known only to the one who walked it

functional_tags.tag: attaches provenance or origin to an object so it carries its own story
functional_tags.note: a mark showing where a tool was made, a signature scent woven into a garment, a stitch pattern only one guild uses, a cord that names each hand that held it

functional_tags.tag: makes the bearer appear as something they are not
functional_tags.note: disguise, false guild affiliation, altered species impression, projected authority, impersonation of a known person

functional_tags.tag: signals belonging, rank, or affiliation in a way that commands a specific response
functional_tags.note: guild credential, tribal mark, authority token, a signal that opens doors or prevents conflict, a rank indicator readable only by initiates

functional_tags.tag: makes the bearer more persuasive or credible without changing what they say
functional_tags.note: a voice that carries authority, an appearance that suggests expertise, a smell that makes others trust, a posture aid, a social amplifier

functional_tags.tag: makes the bearer less noticeable, memorable, or socially legible
functional_tags.note: social invisibility, forgettability, blending into a crowd, removing the impression of threat, making a transaction not worth remembering

functional_tags.tag: induces a specific emotional state in a target — not by force but by influence
functional_tags.note: calm, trust, unease, generosity, nostalgia, grief, desire — useful in negotiation, ritual, animal handling, crowd management, conflict de-escalation

functional_tags.tag: marks or binds an agreement between parties in a way that has consequence
functional_tags.note: a contract seal, a debt marker, an oath witness, a bond that causes discomfort if violated, a record that cannot be denied

functional_tags.tag: signals or projects threat in a way that changes how others behave around the bearer
functional_tags.note: an intimidation aura, a reputation marker, a smell or sound that reads as dangerous, a visible mark of past violence, something that makes people recalculate

functional_tags.tag: shifts how a specific category of people or creatures reacts to the bearer
functional_tags.note: makes guards cooperative, calms one species of predator, makes merchants offer fair prices, makes children unafraid, makes elders willing to speak

functional_tags.tag: commands attention in a way that is difficult to refuse or look away from
functional_tags.note: silences a shouting crowd, pulls focus from a rival performer, forces a distracted ruler to listen, stops a panicked beast mid-lunge

functional_tags.tag: preserves the bearer's reputation or social standing against a specific pressure
functional_tags.note: deflects an accusation, covers an error in protocol, provides an alibi at the right moment, resists a slander, prevents a loss of face in public

functional_tags.tag: confers a temporary social role or legal standing the bearer does not normally hold
functional_tags.note: marks the bearer as a legitimate envoy for one meeting, grants the right to speak at a council, permits entry to a closed ceremony, makes a stranger count as family for one night

functional_tags.tag: transfers, delegates, or represents someone else's authority
functional_tags.note: a proxy token for a guildmaster, a messenger's mark, a seal that lets the bearer decide on behalf of another, an envoy's credential

functional_tags.tag: binds two or more parties into a declared relationship that is legible to others
functional_tags.note: alliance cords worn by both parties, partnership tokens, guild apprenticeship marks, a shared mark that names oath-kin, marriage bands

functional_tags.tag: enables or steadies the bearer through a public performance, ceremony, or presentation
functional_tags.note: steadies a nervous speaker, supports a singer's endurance, enhances a ritual officiant's presence, helps a healer maintain composure during a public treatment

functional_tags.tag: makes the bearer distinguishable to allies at a distance without revealing them to others
functional_tags.note: a color visible to one's own side on a battlefield, a scent only one's family recognizes, a sound signature a partner knows, a mark readable by a sworn ally from far away

functional_tags.tag: moderates the bearer's own emotional state to better fit a difficult social situation
functional_tags.note: suppresses visible fear during negotiation, dampens grief during a public rite, sharpens focus during an interrogation, steadies the hands before a performance

functional_tags.tag: makes a transaction, request, or social contact feel natural and already-agreed
functional_tags.note: frames a sale as already happening, presents a request as routine, makes refusal feel socially expensive, makes a gift feel expected rather than asked for

functional_tags.tag: permanently or semi-permanently rewrites a visible aspect of the bearer's identity
functional_tags.note: a dye that cannot be washed out, a scar that proves a role, a mark that changes how elders read a person's status, an ornament that reveals a hidden truth about the wearer

functional_tags.tag: allows passage through, across, or into something that would otherwise resist
functional_tags.note: opens locked things, crosses difficult terrain, gains entry to a sealed space, passes a social barrier, navigates a ritual boundary

functional_tags.tag: makes the bearer's movement silent, traceless, or difficult to follow
functional_tags.note: silent travel, no scent trail, no footprints, movement that confuses trackers, passage that leaves no memory in witnesses

functional_tags.tag: increases the efficiency or ease of covering distance
functional_tags.note: faster travel, reduced fatigue on the road, lighter load, a route that takes less time than it should, a mount that performs beyond its limits

functional_tags.tag: allows movement or function in an environment the bearer is not built for
functional_tags.note: breathing underwater, moving in extreme cold, climbing without grip, operating in darkness, surviving at altitude, working in toxic air

functional_tags.tag: establishes or marks a route, boundary, or position
functional_tags.note: waymarking, territory declaration, ritual boundary setting, a trail that can be followed back, a border that others recognize as real

functional_tags.tag: allows the bearer to carry or transport significantly more than their body permits
functional_tags.note: expanded carrying capacity, a pack that distributes weight, a creature trained to carry loads, a container that holds more than its size suggests, a ritual that lightens

functional_tags.tag: retrieves a distant or hard-to-reach object back to the bearer
functional_tags.note: a fetching cord, a trained creature that retrieves, a weighted tool that does not need to be thrown hard, a ritual that calls a specific object to hand

functional_tags.tag: recovers a path or returns the bearer to a location visited before
functional_tags.note: retraces a traveler's steps, returns to a previous camp, finds the home that was left, points back toward a marked starting point

functional_tags.tag: opens or maintains a line of communication across distance
functional_tags.note: paired tokens that signal each other, a drum whose beat is heard by a counterpart, a scent that reaches a partner miles away, a ritual link between two sites

functional_tags.tag: grants safe passage through territory that is normally hostile to the bearer
functional_tags.note: safe conduct through a rival tribe's land, a token that calms a guardian beast, a scent that reads as allied to a hostile hive, a ritual that opens a poisoned grove

functional_tags.tag: permits an action or entry only once — and cannot be used again
functional_tags.note: a seal that breaks as it opens, a ritual passage granted a single time, a one-shot diplomatic entry, a bridge that collapses after one crossing

functional_tags.tag: provides a stable foothold or anchor in a situation that is physically or socially shifting
functional_tags.note: an anchor in shifting sand, a grip on a slippery surface, a stance aid in a storm, a social anchor when a conversation slides sideways

functional_tags.tag: manages a transition between two distinct states, zones, or conditions
functional_tags.note: moving between waking and trance, between clean and ritual-prepared, between freezing and safe, between wilderness and camp, between land and water

functional_tags.tag: permits movement through a crowd or group without being stopped or engaged
functional_tags.note: slips through a market without being solicited, passes a checkpoint without conversation, moves through mourners without being drawn in, walks past an angry crowd unchallenged

functional_tags.tag: enables safe or delicate movement across a fragile, dangerous, or sensitive surface
functional_tags.note: crossing thin ice, moving over a cursed floor without triggering, walking through a swarm without stirring it, stepping through a ritual circle without disrupting it

functional_tags.tag: prevents or resists physical harm to the bearer or a designated target
functional_tags.note: armor function, warding, harm reduction, protection of a specific body area, shielding a companion or object rather than the bearer

functional_tags.tag: resists or nullifies a specific category of harm or threat
functional_tags.note: poison resistance, fire protection, disease immunity, resistance to a specific type of creature, protection from a specific ritual effect

functional_tags.tag: stabilizes or maintains a condition against forces trying to change it
functional_tags.note: keeps a wound from worsening, holds a structure together under stress, prevents a ritual from destabilizing, maintains a social situation that is about to collapse

functional_tags.tag: returns the bearer or a target toward a prior state after change or damage
functional_tags.note: healing, object repair, reversal of a transformation, undoing a ritual effect, restoring a relationship after conflict

functional_tags.tag: extends endurance beyond what the body or material would normally sustain
functional_tags.note: stamina in travel, functioning without sleep or food, a structure that lasts longer than its materials should, a ritual that holds past its normal duration

functional_tags.tag: contains, seals, or prevents the spread of something
functional_tags.note: traps a creature, seals a wound, contains a magical effect, prevents a secret from spreading, isolates a corrupted object, quarantines a space

functional_tags.tag: transfers harm or consequence from the bearer to something or someone else
functional_tags.note: redirects a blow, passes a curse to a new host, makes a contract violation fall on a proxy, deflects a social attack toward a third party

functional_tags.tag: blunts or reduces the severity of an incoming effect rather than preventing it entirely
functional_tags.note: padding that turns a killing blow into a bruise, a draught that lessens a poison's grip, a ward that shortens a curse's duration, a word that takes the sting from an insult

functional_tags.tag: delays the onset of a consequence so it can be addressed later
functional_tags.note: holds off infection until proper treatment, postpones the effect of a poison, delays a structure's collapse, keeps a grief at arm's length until after the work is done

functional_tags.tag: absorbs and dissipates a specific incoming effect into itself
functional_tags.note: a rod that draws a curse into itself until it cracks, a cloak that takes a wound instead of the wearer, a bowl that catches a spirit's anger, armor that accepts damage and breaks later

functional_tags.tag: provides immunity or protection only while a specific condition holds
functional_tags.note: protected while silent, harmless while fasting, unassailable while within a drawn circle, safe while the song continues, immune while not crossing a threshold

functional_tags.tag: isolates the bearer from a harmful sensory or psychological environment
functional_tags.note: blocks a curse-song's effect, mutes an oppressive grief-fog, dampens a fear-projecting beast, muffles a maddening resonance, insulates against an overwhelming grief-site

functional_tags.tag: reinforces a vulnerable or weak point in an existing structure or arrangement
functional_tags.note: braces a failing wall, binds a cracked shaft, supports a weak ankle, stabilizes a loose agreement, patches the thin place in a ward

functional_tags.tag: maintains the bearer's sense of self, will, or identity against external pressure
functional_tags.note: resists a charm, holds an oath under torture, keeps composure in grief, preserves the bearer's identity against a manipulator, resists a spirit's attempt to displace the self

functional_tags.tag: binds, restrains, or holds a target against their will or motion
functional_tags.note: physical restraint, immobilization, trapping a creature, holding a person in place during a ritual, securing cargo that resists being moved

functional_tags.tag: compels or strongly inclines a target toward a specific behavior
functional_tags.note: a geas, a debt enforcement tool, a trained animal command, a ritual obligation, a social pressure that cannot easily be refused

functional_tags.tag: prevents a target from performing a specific type of action
functional_tags.note: silences speech, prevents casting, stops a creature from fleeing, blocks a specific skill, creates a behavioral prohibition

functional_tags.tag: draws a target toward a specific location, object, or person
functional_tags.note: lures a creature, pulls a person into a negotiation, makes an object irresistible to a specific type of being, draws a spirit to a ritual site

functional_tags.tag: causes a target to redirect attention, effort, or aggression away from their current focus
functional_tags.note: misdirection in combat, distraction in negotiation, redirecting an animal from a herd, pulling a crowd's attention, making a ritual effect seek a different target

functional_tags.tag: applies a lasting harmful or degrading effect to a target over time
functional_tags.note: poison, curse, infection, rot, a debt that compounds, a social stigma that spreads, a wound that resists healing

functional_tags.tag: marks a target so they can be tracked, recognized, or treated differently later
functional_tags.note: a tracker's mark visible to guild members, a brand that flags debt, a scent that makes a creature recognizable to hunters, a ritual mark of exile

functional_tags.tag: imposes a trigger condition on a target's future action — takes effect only when that action occurs
functional_tags.note: an obligation that activates when they cross a border, a curse that fires on a spoken name, a bond that tightens when they lie, a debt that comes due on a specific act

functional_tags.tag: weakens or diminishes a target's capacity to act, think, or resist
functional_tags.note: reduces a fighter's strength, muddles a caster's focus, blunts an animal's senses, drains a stubborn target's will, undermines a negotiator's confidence

functional_tags.tag: holds a situation or relationship in place until a specific condition is met
functional_tags.note: a truce that holds until the debt is paid, a standoff held by a ritual no one wants to break, a wound that stays open until the oath is spoken, a bond that freezes until a named act is performed

functional_tags.tag: forces a truthful statement or closes off a specific lie in a formal context
functional_tags.note: a truth-bond for an interrogation, an oath stone that refuses the wrong answer, a ritual that makes a named denial impossible, a witness that catches one specific class of falsehood

functional_tags.tag: enforces a payment, surrender, or toll when a target tries to cross a threshold or break a rule
functional_tags.note: a territorial mark that demands a gift, a ritual boundary that claims a portion, a convention that requires tribute to cross, a curse that takes something when a promise is broken

functional_tags.tag: severs or dissolves a specific bond, connection, or relationship
functional_tags.note: breaks an oath, separates a handler from a beast, ends a bond between an item and its owner, dissolves a partnership, severs a spirit from its anchor

functional_tags.tag: makes the cost of a specific action increase with each repetition
functional_tags.note: a curse that bites deeper with each lie, a mark that grows more visible with each theft, a bond that tightens with each excuse, a wound that deepens with each betrayal

functional_tags.tag: disrupts an opponent's coordination, timing, or teamwork
functional_tags.note: breaks a pack's hunting pattern, splits a negotiation team, unsyncs a ritual coven, confuses a shield-wall, makes allies hesitate at the wrong moment

functional_tags.tag: holds a target visible, exposed, or unable to hide or disguise themselves
functional_tags.note: marks a fugitive in a crowd, prevents a shifter from changing back, keeps a liar's tells obvious, stops an ambusher from finding cover

functional_tags.tag: preserves an object, substance, or creature against decay, time, or change
functional_tags.note: food preservation, wound dressing that holds, a hide that resists rot, a ritual component kept potent, a memory held intact, a body prepared for burial

functional_tags.tag: improves the quality, durability, or effectiveness of a material or object being worked
functional_tags.note: a tool that makes better tools, a substance that strengthens fibers, a ritual that improves a batch of medicine, a binding agent that holds longer

functional_tags.tag: tracks or reveals the origin, movement, or ownership of an object or creature
functional_tags.note: marks stolen goods, follows a traded item's path, identifies who handled something, traces a creature's territory, records who has touched a contract

functional_tags.tag: reproduces, duplicates, or copies something with precision
functional_tags.note: copies a map, replicates a seal, duplicates a ritual component, produces a second of something that existed as one, copies the appearance of an object or marking

functional_tags.tag: separates, refines, or extracts a specific component from a mixture or material
functional_tags.note: purifies water, extracts a toxin from a plant, separates a ritual ingredient from a compound, identifies the useful part of a raw material

functional_tags.tag: combines or binds separate things into a more effective whole
functional_tags.note: joins broken objects, fuses ritual components, binds a wound, creates a compound, merges two separate agreements into one

functional_tags.tag: measures, calibrates, or establishes a precise standard
functional_tags.note: a trade weight, a distance rope, a time-keeper, a dose measurement tool, a ritual that establishes what counts as enough or what counts as equal

functional_tags.tag: transforms a raw or unprepared material into a usable form
functional_tags.note: tans a hide quickly, cures a bone for carving, readies a fungus for pigment, renders fat for long storage, prepares a stone to receive a ritual impression

functional_tags.tag: facilitates a trade or exchange that would otherwise not happen
functional_tags.note: a neutral table-stone that lets rivals trade, a token that guarantees safe exchange, a marker that lets unrelated parties transact, a ritual that removes the shame of selling

functional_tags.tag: divides a single resource into fair or deliberate shares
functional_tags.note: a cut-stone that divides meat fairly, a ritual that apportions inheritance, a mark that shows each partner's share, a tool that halves a batch exactly

functional_tags.tag: scales up the output of a craft or process beyond what one worker normally produces
functional_tags.note: processes three hides at once, blesses a whole batch with one ritual, lets one weaver keep four threads, salts enough for a village in the time it takes to do one family's portion

functional_tags.tag: authenticates craftsmanship or origin in a way that cannot be easily forged
functional_tags.note: a maker's mark legible only to peers, a signature scent woven into a garment, a stitch pattern only one guild teaches, a glaze technique a forger cannot match

functional_tags.tag: reclaims or salvages value from something previously discarded, broken, or spent
functional_tags.note: recovers a ritual component from ash, re-spins frayed cord into usable thread, extracts one last dose from spent ingredients, rebuilds a broken tool differently from what it was

functional_tags.tag: enables fine or precise work beyond the worker's ordinary steadiness or resolution
functional_tags.note: an aid for tiny stitching, a frame that holds work absolutely still, a focus that steadies a carver's tremor, a filter that lets a compounder see micro-quantities

functional_tags.tag: assigns or defends a claim of value on an object or service
functional_tags.note: a merchant's assessment mark, a ritual that fixes a price, an ornament that asserts rarity, a tally that enforces a payment schedule

functional_tags.tag: assists or accelerates the performance of a ritual or magical act
functional_tags.note: reduces preparation time, lowers the ingredient cost, stabilizes an unstable ritual, extends the duration of an effect, makes a marginal success into a reliable one

functional_tags.tag: substitutes for a rare, expensive, or unavailable component
functional_tags.note: replaces a specific ingredient, stands in for a living creature in a ritual, allows a ceremony to proceed without its normal requirements

functional_tags.tag: stores a magical effect and releases it under a specific condition
functional_tags.note: a spell held in an object, a ritual triggered by contact, a blessing activated at the right moment, a curse that waits for its condition

functional_tags.tag: channels or focuses a specific type of magical force more efficiently
functional_tags.note: a crystal that focuses a lore's energy, a vessel that holds shamanic power without loss, an instrument that carries lyådskapare sound further, an orakel token that improves negotiation

functional_tags.tag: disrupts, dampens, or interferes with magical forces in its vicinity
functional_tags.note: anti-magic field, ritual interference, makes a sejdare's connection unstable, disrupts a shaman's ingredient, breaks concentration on a spell

functional_tags.tag: makes contact with or receives a response from a non-physical entity
functional_tags.note: spirit communication, ancestor consultation, addressing a god's emissary, asking a question of a dead person, calling something from Advenire

functional_tags.tag: marks a location, object, or person as significant in a way that others with the right perception can read
functional_tags.note: a sacred marking, a curse visible to those with magical perception, a guild seal that announces what it protects, a territorial marker readable by spirits

functional_tags.tag: reverses, cancels, or undoes a magical effect already in place
functional_tags.note: breaks a curse, ends a ritual early, dissolves a binding, cancels a blessing that has become a problem, removes a marking

functional_tags.tag: buffers or softens a miscast, ritual failure, or magical backlash
functional_tags.note: absorbs a failed spell's recoil, cushions a shaman's failed trance return, stabilizes a ritual that partially broke, takes the first fragment of a miscast curse

functional_tags.tag: extends the duration or persistence of a magical effect past its normal fade
functional_tags.note: prolongs a ward, keeps a charm active another day, stretches a preservation ritual, holds a summoned presence a little longer

functional_tags.tag: provides a threshold or gateway between ordinary space and a ritual-prepared space
functional_tags.note: a stone that marks the start of sacred ground, an entryway into trance, a threshold that only prepared participants can cross cleanly

functional_tags.tag: carries or transmits a blessing, curse, or prayer from one party to another at a distance
functional_tags.note: a token that takes a blessing from a priest to a distant relative, an object that delivers a curse to a named target, a messenger-bone that carries a prayer toward Advenire

functional_tags.tag: anchors the bearer so they do not lose themselves during trance, possession, or deep magical work
functional_tags.note: a cord worn during trance so the shaman comes back, a mark that preserves the self during spirit-possession, an anchor object that survives a sejdare's deep commune

functional_tags.tag: gathers or harvests ambient magical residue, ritual remnants, or spiritual leavings
functional_tags.note: collects ash from a completed rite into a usable component, gathers leftover blessing from a temple's edges, draws residual spirit presence from a battlefield, scavenges a miscast's scattered energy

functional_tags.tag: consecrates, claims, or dedicates something to a specific divine or spiritual power
functional_tags.note: dedicates a tool to Mortmori, consecrates a space to Folgor, claims a kill for an ancestor, gives a birth to Kung Kallus, marks a site as Viaträdet's

functional_tags.tag: desecrates, profanes, or strips something of a ritual status it previously held
functional_tags.note: strips an object's consecration, makes a sacred site temporarily unusable, nullifies a god's claim on a person, removes a mark of religious standing

functional_tags.tag: certifies that a ritual has been correctly performed or a condition correctly met
functional_tags.note: a ritual witness that confirms completion, a token that appears only when an offering was accepted, a mark that forms only if the procedure was followed exactly

functional_tags.tag: influences the behavior, disposition, or movement of animals
functional_tags.note: calms a frightened animal, draws a specific creature type, repels predators, makes a wild animal tolerate handling, signals safety or danger to nearby fauna

functional_tags.tag: affects the growth, health, or behavior of plants or fungi
functional_tags.note: accelerates growth, kills a plant or fungus, makes a medicinal herb more potent, causes a vine to grow in a specific direction, revives a dying crop

functional_tags.tag: reads or interprets the current state of the natural environment
functional_tags.note: weather prediction, terrain assessment, water quality reading, soil condition, the health of a forest, whether a place has been disturbed recently

functional_tags.tag: locates a specific natural resource in unfamiliar terrain
functional_tags.note: water finding, edible plant detection, mineral location, shelter assessment, the presence of a specific creature, a usable path through difficult ground

functional_tags.tag: alters or manipulates a localized environmental condition
functional_tags.note: clears fog, stirs still air, dries wet ground, cools a hot space, makes a fire burn hotter or cooler, draws rain to a small area

functional_tags.tag: temporarily bonds a creature to the bearer's presence or purpose
functional_tags.note: tames a wild animal temporarily, summons a creature to assist, holds a creature's attention, makes a creature follow a specific instruction

functional_tags.tag: manipulates sound in the surrounding environment
functional_tags.note: carries a voice further, deadens sound in a space, redirects an echo, makes a location seem occupied or empty, amplifies a specific frequency

functional_tags.tag: makes use of decay, rot, or death as a productive resource rather than treating it as waste
functional_tags.note: a fungal culture that cleans wounds, rot that accelerates another process, a carrion lure that aids a hunter, death-ground soil that strengthens a specific plant

functional_tags.tag: reads, anticipates, or provides shelter against an incoming change in weather or season
functional_tags.note: a storm-bone that warns of coming weather, a pouch that signals before rain, a stone that cools before heat arrives, a ritual that braces a camp for a weather front

functional_tags.tag: potentiates or shifts behavior in harmony with a seasonal, tidal, or cyclic pattern
functional_tags.note: a full-moon charm that strengthens at the right phase, a tidal item that tightens with the sea, a spring-bound blessing, something that wakes at first frost

functional_tags.tag: supports survival through a specific window of scarcity, exposure, or hostile conditions
functional_tags.note: stretches a water ration, extracts nutrition from poor forage, wards a camp through one storm, keeps a fire alive through a wet night, holds body heat through one night of exposure

functional_tags.tag: signals to, communicates with, or summons a specific species at range
functional_tags.note: a call that draws one specific bird, a scent that brings one predator species, a marked bone a pack will come to find, a whistle only one kind of creature responds to

functional_tags.tag: integrates a living creature into the bearer's equipment or toolkit as a working component
functional_tags.note: a symbiote worn under a cloak, a bird trained as a scout and messenger, a beast of burden modified to signal danger, a creature that functions as a living sensor

functional_tags.tag: marks or claims territory in a way that other creatures or persons recognize as a boundary
functional_tags.note: a scent post that warns off rivals, a marker that declares a hunting ground, a ritual boundary that beasts recognize, a plant-sign that names an owner

functional_tags.tag: only functions when a specific environmental condition is present
functional_tags.note: requires wind to activate, charges only in sunlight, operates only on disturbed ground, works only in silence, only below freezing, only near running water

functional_tags.tag: rebalances or restores an environmental condition that has been disturbed
functional_tags.note: quiets a polluted stream, calms a hive disturbed by a battle, resettles soil after digging, restores a grove's silence after a rite, returns a meadow's scent after contamination

functional_tags.tag: detects the presence of spirit, divine attention, or ritual activity in the surrounding environment
functional_tags.note: warms when a spirit crosses a threshold, darkens near a recent blood-rite, chills in the presence of Mortmori's attention, resonates where Advenire is thin
